rows.name: Gateron Oil King
rows.note: Oil Kings remain in vendor rotation at NK and CK with steady stock turnover; no restock announcement or new sound-test viral moment surfaced in the May 11–17 window.

rows.name: HMX Cloud
rows.note: HMX's next-generation lubrication system is in final validation per an April 2026 R&D update, with new components not expected until Q3–Q4 2026; no new W20 community event moved the needle.

rows.name: Cherry MX2A revisions
rows.note: Enthusiast coverage continues to frame MX2A as a solid introductory option that will not displace HMX or Gateron in the mid-tier; coverage arguing for mechanical switches over Hall-effect still does not pick MX2A as the exemplar.

rows.name: MT3 profile
rows.note: Drop's MT3 catalog holds its retro-build niche with no new set launch or major restock announced for this window; the profile ticks along on Susuwatari and Black-on-White steady sales.

rows.name: GMK CYL Prussian Alert
rows.note: Group buy opened May 15 on KBDfans with a global vendor network spanning EU, UK, US, Canada, Korea, Japan, Australia, and MENA; IC thread logged over 121,000 reads before the window opened.

rows.name: DCS Olivetti
rows.note: GB closed April 13 and is in production with a Q3 2026 delivery estimate; momentum cooling naturally in the post-close window with no new community events to sustain it.

rows.name: Alice layout
rows.note: No new Alice ICs appeared on GeekHack during the May 11 window; community attention continues to migrate toward split and 75% formats as those categories sustain active group-buy pipelines.

rows.name: Split / ergo (Voyager, Glove80)
rows.note: Multiple 'best ergonomic keyboards 2026' roundups published this week continue to cite ZSA Voyager and Glove80 as the top two picks for programmers; the category is generating consistent evergreen search traffic as a distinct buying cohort.

rows.name: 75% layout
rows.note: KeebFinder's active group-buy filter shows multiple 75% keyboards in live windows this week including Zonex 75 at Prototypist; Mode Sonnet and Encore fulfillments sustain builder interest in the format.

rows.name: Mode Designs
rows.note: Encore 2026 pre-orders (open since April 16, shipping July) generate coverage alongside a teaser for the Prologue — a 98% full-size with a new Crown gasket mount system slated for summer 2026.

rows.name: CannonKeys
rows.note: Multiple GMK CYL group buys (King of the Seas, Gonzales, Greg R2) remain live through the storefront; no new headline launch this week but transaction cadence is steady.

rows.name: Prototypist
rows.note: Prototypist carried 19 live group buys this week including Slate Zero and SWG Classic Blue (both closing May 18) and DCS Grass Valley — one of their densest active-window weeks of the year.

rows.name: Wuque Studio
rows.note: Morandi switch steady-seller status holds but no new product announcement or IC surfaced during the May 11–17 window; storefront restock cadence continues without a headline event.

rows.name: Keychron
rows.note: Q6 Ultra 8K and V5 Ultra 8K review cycle remains active at Tom's Hardware and AppleInsider into May; the ZMK wireless story draws 'first mass-produced ZMK keyboard' framing with no competitors matching the 660-hour battery claim.

rows.name: Cherry (GMK manufacturer)
rows.note: A GeekHack IC for the YuRui HE switch posted May 10 signals new HE entrants beyond Cherry's orbit; Cherry's enthusiast footprint narrows to GMK manufacturing as MX2A stays categorized as an entry-level option.
